final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: editorial photo, cozy lifestyle
Primary request: a fluffy orange tabby cat basking on a windowsill, winter street view outside
Scene/backdrop: cozy indoor room with warm wooden windowsill, snowy winter street visible through frosted glass window
Subject: fluffy orange tabby cat with soft thick fur, relaxed sleeping pose, paws tucked under body, peaceful expression
Style/medium: soft photorealistic illustration, warm cozy aesthetic
Composition/framing: medium shot, eye-level perspective, cat as focal point with window frame visible
Lighting/mood: warm golden afternoon sunlight streaming through window, soft diffused glow, healing and tranquil mood
Color palette: warm amber and cream tones inside, cool blue-white snow outside, soft orange fur
Materials/textures: ultra-soft fluffy fur with visible individual strands, warm fabric cushion, frosted window glass, soft snow texture
Constraints: maintain fluffy fur texture, keep warm indoor vs cold outdoor contrast, healing atmosphere
Avoid: harsh shadows, plastic-looking fur, cluttered background, dark moody tones, watermark
